title: Hiring Production Engineer at JK Tyre Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at JK Tyre Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
JK Tyre Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About JK Tyre Ventures Solutions:
JK Tyre Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
